Code of Conduct
Staff Handbook 
STILL & SOCIAL – STAFF HANDBOOK
Welcome to Still & Social
Still & Social is not just a place to eat or drink — it is a sanctuary for the mind, body, and soul. Everything we create, from our food and drinks to the way we serve and interact, is guided by elegance, calm, and authenticity.
By joining our team, you are becoming part of something meaningful: a community where care, attention, and soulful hospitality are at the heart of everything we do.
Still & Social Values
At Still & Social, our values guide how we show up for our guests, for each other, and for ourselves:
Nourishment – We care for mind, body, and spirit in every detail of the experience.
Intentionality – Nothing is rushed or careless; every action has purpose.
Warmth & Hospitality – Guests feel seen, welcomed, and celebrated.
Community & Regeneration – We uplift people and place, giving back more than we take.
Authenticity – We honour honesty, humility, and grounded connections.
Still & Social Management
Co-Founder: Matthew Cappello
Co-Founder: Meli Hellier
Our management is here to support your growth, wellbeing, and connection to the Still & Social ethos. Always feel empowered to ask questions, share ideas, or seek guidance.
Trading Hours
Wed – Sun: 5:00 pm – 9:30 pm (Kitchen closes 8:30 pm)
Public Holidays: 5:00 pm – 9:00 pm (Kitchen closes 8:30 pm)
Reservations
We welcome most guests through online bookings. Walk-ins are always invited to join us; however, availability is not guaranteed. If the venue is full, guests are welcome to join our waitlist and will be notified as soon as a table becomes available. This helps us maintain an intimate, balanced flow throughout the space, ensuring everyone can unwind and enjoy the Still & Social experience.
For groups of six or more, we kindly ask that bookings are made in advance, either online or by phone. Our reservation process is handled with care and warmth, so every guest feels part of our sanctuary from the moment they arrive.
To ensure we can accommodate all guests comfortably, the following seating times apply:
Up to 3 guests: 1.5-hour seating
4 guests or more: 2-hour seating
Large Reservations (8+)
For gatherings of eight or more, we offer an exclusive set menu designed to complement the shared experience of larger tables. This curated selection highlights our signature dishes and seasonal creations, crafted for a seamless and social dining flow. Please note that large group bookings will enjoy this menu exclusively, as the standard menu is reserved for smaller tables.
Cancellation Policy
We understand that plans can shift, and we aim to accommodate them with care. To maintain a smooth experience for all guests, a valid card is required at booking. If a reservation is cancelled without the required notice or guests do not attend, a fee will be charged to the card on file.
Cancellation fees:
Late cancellations or no-shows: $50 per table
Missing guests: $20 per absent guest
(when fewer guests arrive without at least 2 hours’ notice)
Guests may adjust or cancel their booking up to 2 hours prior (or 24 hours for groups of 6+) at no charge.
If guests do not arrive within 15 minutes and have not contacted the venue, the reservation will be                                                                                                                                                  marked as a no-show. All no-shows must be recorded to support consistent, thoughtful service.
STILL & SOCIAL SEQUENCE OF SERVICE
Welcome Guests
Greet each guest with a smile, eye contact, and genuine presence.
Walk guests to table and seat them elegantly (Pull out chair if possible)
Introduce Still & Social
Offer still or sparkling water - small gestures of care set the tone.
Acknowledge expectations and ensure guests feel at ease.
Beverage Ritual
After offering still or sparkling water, pour it at the table with care, then present condiments — lemon, lime, orange etc — for guests to personalise their refreshment.
Guide thoughtfully: Guests are invited to begin their experience with a handcrafted cocktail, a glass of wine, or a refreshing soft drink for the little ones.
Always repeat orders back and serve with elegance, announcing names or brands.
Our Offerings
Our menu flows from small moments in the beginning to more generous dishes for the main rituals.
Read back the full order and set the table with the appropriate cutlery.
Suggest pairings with intention, never push.
Once guests have made their selections, menus are to be collected, leaving the drinks menu on the table for continued enjoyment.
The Experience
Present dishes with clarity and pride, naming ingredients or inspirations.
Check in softly after the first few bites — attentive, never intrusive.
Table Refresh
After the main course, gently clear the table to maintain a sense of calm and order.
Present a warm expandable towel to guests, inviting a moment of pause and comfort before dessert.
Ensure the table feels welcoming and prepared (Wipe down table, enhancing the seamless flow of the dining experience.
Final Touch
Offer dessert or sweets with gentle suggestions. Pair with coffee or tea.
Offer guests a small ritual gift to take home — a thoughtful gesture to help them unwind and extend the calm of their Still & Social experience.
Ensure bills are accurate and handled gracefully.
Farewell guests with gratitude: "Thank you for joining us at Still & Social — we look forward to welcoming you again."
